questions.correct: This is a book
questions.hint: Subject + be verb + article + noun
questions.explanation: Simple Present: This/That + is/are দিয়ে কিছু চিহ্নিত করা হয়

questions.correct: He goes to school every day
questions.hint: Subject + verb + preposition + place + time
questions.explanation: 3rd person singular (He/She) এর সাথে verb এ 's/es' যুক্ত হয়

questions.correct: I am reading a book
questions.hint: Subject + am/is/are + verb+ing + object
questions.explanation: Present Continuous: এখন চলছে এমন কাজ বোঝায়

questions.correct: We played football yesterday
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + object + time
questions.explanation: Past Simple: গতকাল/আগে হয়ে গেছে এমন কাজ

questions.correct: I will go to the market tomorrow
questions.hint: Subject + will + verb + preposition + place + time
questions.explanation: Future Simple: ভবিষ্যতে হবে এমন কাজ

questions.correct: She is watching TV now
questions.hint: Subject + is + verb+ing + object + time
questions.explanation: এখন চলছে এমন কাজ বোঝাতে Present Continuous ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: He has finished his homework
questions.hint: Subject + has/have + past participle + object
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: সবে শেষ হয়েছে বা এখনও প্রভাব আছে

questions.correct: They are playing in the garden
questions.hint: Subject + are + verb+ing + preposition + place
questions.explanation: Multiple words এর ক্ষেত্রে 'the garden' একসাথে থাকে

questions.correct: I do not like coffee
questions.hint: Subject + do/does + not + verb + object
questions.explanation: Negative বাক্যে do/does not ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: Was she happy yesterday
questions.hint: Was/Were + subject + adjective + time
questions.explanation: Question এ be verb (was/were) সামনে আসে

questions.correct: They were eating dinner at 8 PM
questions.hint: Subject + were + verb+ing + object + time
questions.explanation: অতীতে কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সময়ে চলছিল এমন কাজ

questions.correct: I have already seen this movie
questions.hint: Subject + have + adverb + past participle + object
questions.explanation: Already সাধারণত have/has এবং past participle এর মাঝে বসে

questions.correct: Does he play cricket?
questions.hint: Does/Do + subject + verb + object + ?
questions.explanation: Yes/No question এ does/do সামনে আসে

questions.correct: The sun is shining brightly
questions.hint: Article + subject + is + verb+ing + adverb
questions.explanation: 'The sun' একটি নির্দিষ্ট বস্তু, তাই 'the' ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: We have been waiting for two hours
questions.hint: Subject + have been + verb+ing + preposition + time
questions.explanation: অতীত থেকে এখন পর্যন্ত চলছে এমন কাজ

questions.correct: My father works in a bank
questions.hint: Possessive + subject + verb + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: Habitual action এর জন্য Present Simple ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: They didn't come to the party
questions.hint: Subject + didn't + verb + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: Past Negative: didn't + base form of verb

questions.correct: It will probably rain tomorrow
questions.hint: Subject + will + adverb + verb + time
questions.explanation: Adverb of probability (probably) সাধারণত will এর পরে বসে

questions.correct: She has been studying since morning
questions.hint: Subject + has been + verb+ing + preposition + time
questions.explanation: Since দিয়ে শুরুর সময় বোঝানো হয় Present Perfect Continuous এ

questions.correct: Can you swim?
questions.hint: Modal + subject + verb + ?
questions.explanation: Modal verb (can/could/will) দিয়ে question শুরু হয়

questions.correct: She wrote a letter to her friend
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + article + object + preposition + possessive + noun
questions.explanation: 'to' preposition ব্যবহার করে recipient (প্রাপক) বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: What are you doing?
questions.hint: Wh-word + are + subject + verb+ing + ?
questions.explanation: Wh-question এ wh-word সবার আগে বসে

questions.correct: Before he had eaten dinner
questions.hint: Time word + subject + had + past participle + object
questions.explanation: Past Perfect: অতীতের দুটি কাজের মধ্যে আগে ঘটা কাজ

questions.correct: We are going to visit our grandparents
questions.hint: Subject + am/is/are + going to + verb + possessive + noun
questions.explanation: 'be going to' পরিকল্পিত ভবিষ্যত কাজ বোঝায়

questions.correct: He runs faster than me
questions.hint: Subject + verb + comparative adverb + than + object
questions.explanation: Comparative (তুলনা) করার সময় 'than' ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: You must finish your homework
questions.hint: Subject + modal + verb + possessive + noun
questions.explanation: 'Must' obligation (বাধ্যতা) বোঝায়

questions.correct: I have never been to Delhi
questions.hint: Subject + have + adverb + past participle + preposition + place
questions.explanation: Negative adverb (never) have/has এর পরে বসে

questions.correct: Would you like some tea?
questions.hint: Modal + subject + verb + determiner + noun + ?
questions.explanation: 'Some' offer করার সময় question এ ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: The baby was sleeping peacefully
questions.hint: Article + subject + was + verb+ing + adverb
questions.explanation: অতীতে কোনো সময়ে চলছিল এমন কাজ

questions.correct: He is the tallest boy in the class
questions.hint: Subject + is + article + superlative adj + noun + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: Superlative (সর্বোচ্চ) adjective এর আগে 'the' ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: She does not eat meat
questions.hint: Subject + does + not + verb + object
questions.explanation: 3rd person singular negative এ 'does not' + base verb ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: Where do you live?
questions.hint: Wh-word + do + subject + verb + ?
questions.explanation: Wh-question এ do/does subject এর আগে বসে

questions.correct: They are building a new house
questions.hint: Subject + are + verb+ing + article + adjective + noun
questions.explanation: বর্তমানে চলছে এমন কাজ বোঝাতে Present Continuous

questions.correct: We visited the museum last week
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + article + noun + time phrase
questions.explanation: Past Simple: নির্দিষ্ট অতীত সময়ে ঘটেছে এমন কাজ

questions.correct: When will they arrive?
questions.hint: Wh-word + will + subject + verb + ?
questions.explanation: Future Wh-question এ wh-word + will + subject + verb

questions.correct: She has already left for work
questions.hint: Subject + has + adverb + past participle + preposition + noun
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: recently completed action

questions.correct: The children were playing outside when it rained
questions.hint: Subject + were + verb+ing + adverb + when + clause
questions.explanation: Past Continuous + Past Simple: একটি কাজ চলছিল আর তখন অন্য কাজ হলো

questions.correct: You should see a doctor
questions.hint: Subject + modal + verb + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Should' advice (পরামর্শ) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: How much does this bag cost?
questions.hint: Wh-phrase + does + subject + verb + ?
questions.explanation: 'How much' দিয়ে মূল্য জানতে চাওয়া হয়

questions.correct: My mother is cooking in the kitchen
questions.hint: Possessive + subject + is + verb+ing + preposition + place
questions.explanation: বর্তমানে মা রান্নাঘরে রান্না করছেন

questions.correct: They had already finished the project
questions.hint: Subject + had + adverb + past participle + article + noun
questions.explanation: Past Perfect: অন্য একটি অতীত কাজের আগে শেষ হয়েছিল

questions.correct: She is going to buy a new car
questions.hint: Subject + is + going to + verb + article + adjective + noun
questions.explanation: 'be going to' ভবিষ্যতের পরিকল্পিত কাজ বোঝায়

questions.correct: I can speak three languages
questions.hint: Subject + modal + verb + quantifier + noun
questions.explanation: 'Can' ability (ক্ষমতা) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: He doesn't like waking up early
questions.hint: Subject + doesn't + verb + gerund + adverb
questions.explanation: 3rd person singular negative: doesn't + base verb

questions.correct: The students were listening to the teacher
questions.hint: Article + subject + were + verb+ing + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: অতীতে শিক্ষার্থীরা শিক্ষকের কথা শুনছিল

questions.correct: Have you ever been to London?
questions.hint: Have + subject + adverb + past participle + preposition + place + ?
questions.explanation: 'Ever' দিয়ে জীবনের কোনো অভিজ্ঞতা সম্পর্কে জানতে চাওয়া হয়

questions.correct: I will be working at this time tomorrow
questions.hint: Subject + will be + verb+ing + preposition + time phrase
questions.explanation: Future Continuous: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সময়ে চলবে এমন কাজ

questions.correct: This flower is more beautiful than that one
questions.hint: Subject + is + more + adjective + than + object
questions.explanation: Long adjectives এর comparative form 'more + adjective' দিয়ে হয়

questions.correct: Could you help me please?
questions.hint: Modal + subject + verb + object + adverb + ?
questions.explanation: 'Could' polite request (বিনীত অনুরোধ) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: It has been raining for three hours
questions.hint: Subject + has been + verb+ing + preposition + time duration
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous: তিন ঘণ্টা ধরে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছে

questions.correct: She did not go to school yesterday
questions.hint: Subject + did + not + verb + preposition + noun + time
questions.explanation: Past Simple Negative: did not + base form of verb

questions.correct: What is your favorite color?
questions.hint: Wh-word + is + possessive + adjective + noun + ?
questions.explanation: Wh-question দিয়ে পছন্দ জানতে চাওয়া

questions.correct: He was reading a newspaper when I called
questions.hint: Subject + was + verb+ing + article + noun + when + clause
questions.explanation: একটি কাজ চলছিল (was reading) আর তখন অন্য কাজ হলো (called)

questions.correct: They will not attend the meeting
questions.hint: Subject + will + not + verb + article + noun
questions.explanation: Future Negative: will not (won't) + base verb

questions.correct: She is the most intelligent student in class
questions.hint: Subject + is + article + most + adjective + noun + preposition + noun
questions.explanation: Superlative: 'the most + adjective' দিয়ে সর্বোচ্চ গুণ বোঝায়

questions.correct: May I come in?
questions.hint: Modal + subject + verb + preposition + ?
questions.explanation: 'May' formal permission (আনুষ্ঠানিক অনুমতি) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: They have been living here since 2010
questions.hint: Subject + have been + verb+ing + adverb + since + time
questions.explanation: 2010 থেকে এখন পর্যন্ত এখানে বসবাস করছে

questions.correct: How often do you exercise?
questions.hint: Wh-phrase + do + subject + verb + ?
questions.explanation: 'How often' দিয়ে কতবার/কত ঘন ঘন জানতে চাওয়া হয়

questions.correct: I was born in 1995
questions.hint: Subject + was + past participle + preposition + year
questions.explanation: Passive voice: 'was born' দিয়ে জন্মের সময় বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I will have finished this book by tomorrow
questions.hint: Subject + will have + past participle + determiner + noun + preposition + time
questions.explanation: Future Perfect: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো সময়ের মধ্যে শেষ হবে এমন কাজ

questions.correct: There are many books on the shelf
questions.hint: There + are + quantifier + noun + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'There are' দিয়ে বহুবচন বস্তুর অস্তিত্ব বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: The dog is barking loudly at night
questions.hint: Article + subject + is + verb+ing + adverb + preposition + time
questions.explanation: রাতে কুকুর জোরে ঘেউ ঘেউ করছে

questions.correct: They had been waiting for an hour before she arrived
questions.hint: Subject + had been + verb+ing + preposition + time + before + clause
questions.explanation: Past Perfect Continuous: আগে চলছিল এবং পরে অন্য কাজ হলো

questions.correct: Would you like to join us?
questions.hint: Modal + subject + like + to + verb + object + ?
questions.explanation: 'Would you like to' দিয়ে বিনীত আমন্ত্রণ জানানো হয়

questions.correct: She wakes up at 6 o'clock every day
questions.hint: Subject + verb + adverb + preposition + time + frequency
questions.explanation: Daily routine বোঝাতে Present Simple ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: This is made of glass
questions.hint: Subject + is + past participle + preposition + material
questions.explanation: Passive: কোনো জিনিস কী দিয়ে তৈরি তা বোঝাতে 'made of' ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: They were not at home last night
questions.hint: Subject + were + not + preposition + place + time
questions.explanation: Past Simple Negative with 'be': was/were + not

questions.correct: What time does the train leave?
questions.hint: Wh-phrase + does + article + noun + verb + ?
questions.explanation: Schedule সম্পর্কে জানতে Present Simple ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: It is going to rain soon
questions.hint: Subject + is + going to + verb + adverb
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে ঘটবে এমন ঘটনার পূর্বাভাস দিতে 'be going to' ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: You must not smoke here
questions.hint: Subject + must + not + verb + adverb
questions.explanation: 'Must not' prohibition (নিষেধাজ্ঞা) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: He has been working for this company since 2018
questions.hint: Subject + has been + verb+ing + preposition + determiner + noun + since + year
questions.explanation: 2018 থেকে এখন পর্যন্ত একই কোম্পানিতে কাজ করছে

questions.correct: Did you enjoy the movie?
questions.hint: Did + subject + verb + article + noun + ?
questions.explanation: Past Simple Question: Did + subject + base verb

questions.correct: This is the best restaurant in town
questions.hint: Subject + is + article + superlative + noun + preposition + place
questions.explanation: Superlative: 'the best' দিয়ে সর্বোত্তম বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: They will be traveling to Japan next month
questions.hint: Subject + will be + verb+ing + preposition + place + time
questions.explanation: Future Continuous: পরের মাসে জাপান ভ্রমণ করবে

questions.correct: I have known him for ten years
questions.hint: Subject + have + past participle + object + preposition + time duration
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: দশ বছর ধরে জানে (stative verb)

questions.correct: Smoking is not allowed here
questions.hint: Gerund + is + not + past participle + adverb
questions.explanation: Passive: ধূমপান এখানে নিষিদ্ধ

questions.correct: He could not find his keys anywhere
questions.hint: Subject + could + not + verb + possessive + noun + adverb
questions.explanation: 'Could not' inability (অক্ষমতা) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: How many people were there at the party?
questions.hint: Wh-phrase + were + there + preposition + article + noun + ?
questions.explanation: 'How many' দিয়ে সংখ্যা জানতে চাওয়া হয়

questions.correct: The road is being repaired right now
questions.hint: Article + subject + is being + past participle + time phrase
questions.explanation: Passive Present Continuous: এখন মেরামত করা হচ্ছে

questions.correct: If it rains I will stay home
questions.hint: If + clause + subject + will + verb + adverb
questions.explanation: First Conditional: সম্ভাব্য শর্ত ও তার ফলাফল

questions.correct: She has to wear a uniform at work
questions.hint: Subject + has to + verb + article + noun + preposition + place
questions.explanation: 'Has to' obligation (বাধ্যবাধকতা) বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: The birds were flying in the sky
questions.hint: Article + subject + were + verb+ing + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: অতীতে পাখিরা আকাশে উড়ছিল

questions.correct: We will have been living here for five years by 2027
questions.hint: Subject + will have been + verb+ing + adverb + preposition + time + by + year
questions.explanation: Future Perfect Continuous: 2027 এর মধ্যে পাঁচ বছর হবে

questions.correct: Neither he nor his friends came
questions.hint: Neither + noun + nor + possessive + noun + past verb
questions.explanation: 'Neither...nor' দিয়ে দুটিই নয় বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I used to live in a village
questions.hint: Subject + used to + verb + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Used to' অতীতের অভ্যাস বা অবস্থা বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: Why are you late today?
questions.hint: Wh-word + are + subject + adjective + time + ?
questions.explanation: 'Why' দিয়ে কারণ জানতে চাওয়া হয়

questions.correct: The meeting has been cancelled
questions.hint: Article + subject + has been + past participle
questions.explanation: Passive Present Perfect: মিটিং বাতিল করা হয়েছে

questions.correct: He is not as tall as I am
questions.hint: Subject + is + not + as + adjective + as + subject + verb
questions.explanation: 'Not as...as' দিয়ে সমান নয় বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: You had better see a doctor
questions.hint: Subject + had better + verb + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Had better' শক্তিশালী পরামর্শ বোঝাতে ব্যবহার হয়

questions.correct: No sooner had he arrived than it started raining
questions.hint: No sooner + had + subject + past participle + than + clause
questions.explanation: 'No sooner...than' দিয়ে একটির পর অন্যটি ঘটেছে বোঝায়

questions.correct: She is interested in learning Spanish
questions.hint: Subject + is + adjective + preposition + gerund + noun
questions.explanation: 'Interested in' দিয়ে আগ্রহ বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: The more you practice the better you become
questions.hint: The + comparative + clause + the + comparative + clause
questions.explanation: 'The more...the better' দিয়ে সমানুপাতিক বৃদ্ধি বোঝায়

questions.correct: I wish I could fly
questions.hint: Subject + wish + subject + modal + verb
questions.explanation: 'I wish' দিয়ে অসম্ভব ইচ্ছা প্রকাশ করা হয়

questions.correct: By the time we arrived the movie had started
questions.hint: By the time + clause + article + noun + had + past participle
questions.explanation: Past Perfect: আমরা পৌঁছানোর আগেই সিনেমা শুরু হয়েছিল

questions.correct: He is known for his honesty
questions.hint: Subject + is + past participle + preposition + possessive + noun
questions.explanation: Passive: তার সততার জন্য পরিচিত

questions.correct: I would rather stay home than go out
questions.hint: Subject + would rather + verb + adverb + than + verb + adverb
questions.explanation: 'Would rather...than' দিয়ে পছন্দের তুলনা করা হয়

questions.correct: The letter was written by John
questions.hint: Article + subject + was + past participle + by + agent
questions.explanation: Passive Voice: চিঠিটি জন লিখেছিল

questions.correct: Not only did he pass the exam but also got a scholarship
questions.hint: Not only + did + subject + verb + article + noun + but also + verb + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Not only...but also' দিয়ে দুটি তথ্য জোর দিয়ে বলা হয়

questions.correct: It is important to drink water every day
questions.hint: It + is + adjective + to + verb + noun + frequency
questions.explanation: 'It is important to' দিয়ে গুরুত্ব বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: Despite the rain they went for a walk
questions.hint: Despite + article + noun + subject + past verb + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Despite' সত্ত্বেও অর্থে ব্যবহার হয় (contrast দেখাতে)

questions.correct: She can not only sing but also dance
questions.hint: Subject + can + not only + verb + but also + verb
questions.explanation: 'Not only...but also' দিয়ে দুটি ক্ষমতা একসাথে বলা হয়

questions.correct: I am looking forward to meeting you
questions.hint: Subject + am + looking forward to + gerund + object
questions.explanation: 'Looking forward to' দিয়ে উন্মুখতা প্রকাশ করা হয়

questions.correct: Had I known I would have come earlier
questions.hint: Had + subject + past participle + subject + would have + past participle + adverb
questions.explanation: Third Conditional (inversion): যদি জানতাম তাহলে আগে আসতাম

questions.correct: The book which I read was interesting
questions.hint: Article + noun + relative pronoun + subject + verb + was + adjective
questions.explanation: Relative clause: 'which' দিয়ে একটি বাক্যের সাথে আরেকটি বাক্য যুক্ত করা হয়

questions.correct: You don't have to come if you are busy
questions.hint: Subject + don't have to + verb + if + clause
questions.explanation: 'Don't have to' দিয়ে কোনো বাধ্যবাধকতা নেই বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: He is used to getting up early
questions.hint: Subject + is + used to + gerund + adverb
questions.explanation: 'Be used to' দিয়ে অভ্যস্ত বোঝানো হয় (gerund নেয়)

questions.correct: What a beautiful sunset this is!
questions.hint: What + article + adjective + noun + subject + verb + !
questions.explanation: Exclamatory sentence: 'What a' দিয়ে বিস্ময় প্রকাশ করা হয়

questions.correct: I have been trying to reach you all day
questions.hint: Subject + have been + verb+ing + to + verb + object + time phrase
questions.explanation: সারাদিন ধরে চেষ্টা করছি (Present Perfect Continuous)

questions.correct: The man who helped me was kind
questions.hint: Article + noun + relative pronoun + verb + object + was + adjective
questions.explanation: Relative clause: 'who' দিয়ে ব্যক্তি সম্পর্কে তথ্য যোগ করা হয়

questions.correct: I would have helped you if I had known
questions.hint: Subject + would have + past participle + object + if + clause
questions.explanation: Third Conditional: অতীতের অসম্ভব শর্ত ও তার ফলাফল

questions.correct: She apologized for being late
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + preposition + gerund + adjective
questions.explanation: 'Apologize for' + gerund দিয়ে দেরি করার জন্য ক্ষমা চাওয়া

questions.correct: It was the most exciting match I had ever seen
questions.hint: Subject + was + article + most + adjective + noun + clause
questions.explanation: Superlative + Past Perfect: এ পর্যন্ত দেখা সবচেয়ে উত্তেজক ম্যাচ

questions.correct: He asked me where I lived
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + object + wh-word + subject + past verb
questions.explanation: Reported Speech: প্রশ্নটি past tense এ রিপোর্ট করা হয়েছে

questions.correct: I am not allowed to stay out late
questions.hint: Subject + am + not + past participle + to + verb + adverb + adjective
questions.explanation: Passive: দেরি করে বাইরে থাকার অনুমতি নেই

questions.correct: She told me that she would come
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + object + that + clause
questions.explanation: Reported Speech: 'will' পরিবর্তিত হয়ে 'would' হয়েছে

questions.correct: If I were you I would accept the job
questions.hint: If + subject + were + object + subject + would + verb + article + noun
questions.explanation: Second Conditional: বাস্তবতার বিপরীত শর্ত (আমি যদি তুমি হতাম)

questions.correct: The more he earns the more he spends
questions.hint: The + comparative + clause + the + comparative + clause
questions.explanation: যত বেশি আয় করে তত বেশি খরচ করে (সমান্তরাল বৃদ্ধি)

questions.correct: I am fond of reading novels
questions.hint: Subject + am + adjective + preposition + gerund + noun
questions.explanation: 'Fond of' + gerund দিয়ে পছন্দ বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: He is too tired to walk any further
questions.hint: Subject + is + too + adjective + to + verb + adverb
questions.explanation: 'Too...to' দিয়ে এত বেশি যে...না বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I prefer tea to coffee
questions.hint: Subject + prefer + noun + to + noun
questions.explanation: 'Prefer...to' দিয়ে দুটির মধ্যে পছন্দ বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: She has a lot of experience in teaching
questions.hint: Subject + has + quantifier + noun + preposition + gerund
questions.explanation: 'A lot of' দিয়ে প্রচুর পরিমাণ বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: We are looking for a new apartment
questions.hint: Subject + are + verb+ing + preposition + article + adjective + noun
questions.explanation: বর্তমানে নতুন অ্যাপার্টমেন্ট খুঁজছেন

questions.correct: He succeeded in solving the problem
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + preposition + gerund + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Succeed in' + gerund দিয়ে সফল হওয়া বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I am thinking of changing my job
questions.hint: Subject + am + verb+ing + preposition + gerund + possessive + noun
questions.explanation: 'Thinking of' দিয়ে চিন্তাভাবনা করা বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: The harder you work the more you achieve
questions.hint: The + comparative + clause + the + comparative + clause
questions.explanation: যত কঠোর পরিশ্রম করবে তত বেশি অর্জন করবে

questions.correct: I am sorry for disturbing you
questions.hint: Subject + am + adjective + preposition + gerund + object
questions.explanation: 'Sorry for' + gerund দিয়ে দুঃখ প্রকাশ করা হয়

questions.correct: He was accused of stealing money
questions.hint: Subject + was + past participle + preposition + gerund + noun
questions.explanation: Passive: 'Accused of' দিয়ে অভিযুক্ত বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I look forward to hearing from you
questions.hint: Subject + look forward to + gerund + preposition + object
questions.explanation: 'Look forward to' দিয়ে অপেক্ষায় থাকা বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: She is capable of doing this work
questions.hint: Subject + is + adjective + preposition + gerund + determiner + noun
questions.explanation: 'Capable of' + gerund দিয়ে সক্ষমতা বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: We must put an end to this practice
questions.hint: Subject + modal + verb + article + noun + preposition + determiner + noun
questions.explanation: 'Put an end to' দিয়ে শেষ করা বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: He is good at playing guitar
questions.hint: Subject + is + adjective + preposition + gerund + noun
questions.explanation: 'Good at' + gerund দিয়ে দক্ষতা বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I am tired of waiting for him
questions.hint: Subject + am + adjective + preposition + gerund + preposition + object
questions.explanation: 'Tired of' + gerund দিয়ে বিরক্ত বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: She insisted on paying the bill
questions.hint: Subject + past verb + preposition + gerund + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Insist on' + gerund দিয়ে জোর দেওয়া বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I am interested in applying for this job
questions.hint: Subject + am + adjective + preposition + gerund + preposition + determiner + noun
questions.explanation: 'Interested in' + gerund দিয়ে আগ্রহ বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: He is known to be a great leader
questions.hint: Subject + is + past participle + to + verb + article + adjective + noun
questions.explanation: Passive: 'Known to be' দিয়ে পরিচিতি বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I used to play cricket when I was young
questions.hint: Subject + used to + verb + noun + when + clause
questions.explanation: 'Used to' অতীতের অভ্যাস বোঝাতে

questions.correct: She would often visit us when she was in town
questions.hint: Subject + would + adverb + verb + object + when + clause
questions.explanation: 'Would' দিয়ে অতীতের পুনরাবৃত্তিমূলক অভ্যাস বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I had my car repaired yesterday
questions.hint: Subject + had + possessive + noun + past participle + time
questions.explanation: Causative: 'have something done' দিয়ে অন্যকে দিয়ে করানো বোঝায়

questions.correct: Let us go for a walk
questions.hint: Let + object + verb + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Let us' দিয়ে প্রস্তাব দেওয়া হয়

questions.correct: Please turn off the lights when you leave
questions.hint: Adverb + phrasal verb + article + noun + when + clause
questions.explanation: Imperative: অনুরোধ বা আদেশ বোঝাতে

questions.correct: He is so tired that he cannot work
questions.hint: Subject + is + so + adjective + that + clause
questions.explanation: 'So...that' দিয়ে কারণ ও ফলাফল বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: It was such a hot day that we stayed home
questions.hint: Subject + was + such + article + adjective + noun + that + clause
questions.explanation: 'Such...that' দিয়ে এত বেশি যে...বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: I have been to the US twice
questions.hint: Subject + have + been + preposition + article + noun + frequency
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: জীবনের অভিজ্ঞতা বোঝাতে

questions.correct: He has not come home yet
questions.hint: Subject + has + not + past participle + noun + adverb
questions.explanation: 'Yet' সাধারণত negative sentence এর শেষে বসে

questions.correct: I have just finished my lunch
questions.hint: Subject + have + adverb + past participle + possessive + noun
questions.explanation: 'Just' দিয়ে এইমাত্র শেষ হয়েছে বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: She has been to Paris three times
questions.hint: Subject + has + been + preposition + place + frequency
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: জীবনের অভিজ্ঞতা (কতবার)

questions.correct: I have not seen him since Monday
questions.hint: Subject + have + not + past participle + object + since + time
questions.explanation: 'Since' দিয়ে নির্দিষ্ট সময় থেকে বোঝানো হয়

questions.correct: We have known each other for a long time
questions.hint: Subject + have + past participle + reciprocal pronoun + preposition + time
questions.explanation: Present Perfect: দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে পরিচিত

questions.correct: He has gone to the bank
questions.hint: Subject + has + past participle + preposition + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'Has gone' দিয়ে গেছে এবং এখনও ফিরে আসেনি বোঝায়

questions.correct: I have been learning English for two years
questions.hint: Subject + have been + verb+ing + noun + preposition + time
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous: দুই বছর ধরে ইংরেজি শিখছে
